final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card illustration for children explaining the story of 赤壁之战 from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon-illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key story bullet points listed with punctuation on the side, and a cartoon narrative scene as the main visual body
Subject: must include the story of 赤壁之战 (三国) depicted in cartoon form
Scene/backdrop: needs a 赤壁 river-battle atmosphere — exact scene composition is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a lively, child-friendly atmosphere — exact mood treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, child-friendly direction — exact colors are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the card title (large, prominent); must include key story bullet points in Chinese listed with punctuation marks alongside the illustration
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title must be clearly legible; bullet points must be visually separated and marked with punctuation; overall content must be age-appropriate for children
Avoid:
